message:
Add series_duplicated conformance coverage (FP-P2D-118)

Add SeriesDuplicated operation to the conformance harness with fixtures for:
- keep=first (mark all but first occurrence as duplicate)
- keep=last (mark all but last occurrence as duplicate)
- keep=none (mark all duplicated values)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
